phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided tours are available
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des visites guidées du fort ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day vee-ZEET gee-DAY doo FOR
phrases.cultural_note: Fort Carré offers guided tours during summer months. Check times at the entrance or the tourist office.

responses.english: Yes, in summer. Ask at the reception.
responses.phonetic: wee, ahn ay-TAY. rahn-say-nyay-VOO ah lah-KUY
responses.local: Oui, en été. Renseignez-vous à l'accueil.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an entry fee to visit the fort
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un droit d'entrée pour visiter le fort ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un drwah dahn-TRAY poor vee-zee-TAY luh FOR
phrases.cultural_note: The fort is managed by the municipality. Entry is usually free or very inexpensive, but hours are limited outside summer.

responses.english: It's free. Hours vary by season.
responses.phonetic: say grah-TWEE. layz oh-REHR vah-REE suh-LON lah say-ZON
responses.local: C'est gratuit. Les horaires varient selon la saison.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for the best viewpoint over Antibes from the fort
phrases.text_local: Quel est le meilleur point de vue sur Antibes depuis le fort ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh may-YOR pwan duh VYOO soor an-TEEB duh-PWEE luh FOR
phrases.cultural_note: Fort Carré offers panoramic views of the Riviera: the old town, the port, Cap d'Antibes, and on clear days, the snow-capped Alps.

responses.english: Go up to the ramparts, the view is magnificent.
responses.phonetic: mon-TAY ahn oh day rahn-PAR, lah vyoo eh mah-nyee-FEEK
responses.local: Montez en haut des remparts, la vue est magnifique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the fort is open on Sundays
phrases.text_local: Le fort est-il ouvert le dimanche ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh FOR eh-TEEL oo-VAIR luh dee-MANSH
phrases.cultural_note: French municipal sites often have reduced hours on Sundays and Mondays. Check locally before making a special trip.

responses.english: Yes, but hours are reduced. Check at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: wee, may layz oh-REHR son ray-DWEE. vay-ree-fee-AY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.local: Oui, mais les horaires sont réduits. Vérifiez à l'entrée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long it takes to walk from the old town to the fort
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps faut-il pour marcher du vieil Antibes au fort ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN duh tahn fo-TEEL poor mar-SHAY doo vyee-lan-TEEB oh FOR
phrases.cultural_note: The walk from the old town to Fort Carré takes about 15 minutes uphill. Wear comfortable shoes, especially in summer.
